text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the last day of summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? My dash record time hasn't changed much...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Have you not realized, Doto?
Behind all your troubles are the summer sun rays.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see. But what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! If you are so curious, you should ask
summer yourself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I also believe another lap around would clear
up your issues. Come, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Okay, thank you for the invite! I hope this
works—I really do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto appears both panicked and
hesitant. No matter how you look at it, her
running lacks the sheer power Opera O's has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This has become a summer of stagnation and
struggle, with no exit in sight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's when a familiar face appears.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ah, Doto's trainer... Hello there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's one of Meisho Doto's peers Admire Vega. I
thought she would still be recovering.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Good enough to walk around, at least.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You look troubled yourself. What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At my wit's end, I share my worries about Air
Shakur's theory—Meisho Doto's "stat ceiling."

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The ceiling story... huh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm not so good at complex conversations, but...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if you watch them from my perspective,
you'll see something different.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Taking a step back and viewing things from
afar might help you see things you couldn't notice
up close.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: For the moment, let's just observe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to hide away while watching Meisho
Doto and T.M. Opera O's partner run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What plagues you, Doto?! Come, try and catch
up with me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Please... wait... Opera Oooo!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No... nothing in particular. But...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It seems like something's holding them back.
Especially Doto...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega is deep in thought. It looks as
though she might be onto something.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh?! Do my eyes deceive me?! Doto, look over
there!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, Ayabe? Is that... really you?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaahhh! Ayabeeee!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Um... it's nice to see you too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our moment of observation is quickly
overshadowed by a heartfelt reunion. The summer
camp of joy and trials eventually comes to a
close.
